name: animated-modal
title: Animated Modal
description: A spring-based modal system with backdrop blur and layered motion.
docs:
# Animated Modal A spring-based modal system with backdrop blur and layered motion. ## Import ```tsx import { Modal, ModalTrigger, ModalContent } from "@/components/ui/animated-modal"; ``` ## Usage ```tsx "use client";

Title

Your content here.

 ``` ## Props - **label** (string) — default: `"Open modal"`: Trigger label - **spotlightColor** (string): Spotlight color - **spotlightOpacity** (number): Opacity > Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component. Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config. ## Install ```bash npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add animated-modal # or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init): npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/animated-modal ```
